www.description: Public marketing site and candidate-facing frontend app

exam-api.description: Candidate exam session and results API

ops-api.description: Worker, webhook reconciliation and observability collector

notes: api/health.js intentionally appears in exam-api, panel-api and ops-api.
api/_lib/** is shared library code and is excluded from ownership checks.
If a new endpoint is added, update this manifest and rerun runtime-boundaries:audit.
